description: grade a performer lot's coupon run from governed run-ledger EVIDENCE (yield is measured, never self-reported) and append a passing Q-record keyed by lot hash to the prev-hash-chained Q-ledger
rules: the lot is the EXAMINEE: it ran the coupons through the channel elsewhere; this perk only measures the evidence
yield = first-pass rate, scrap rate, mean attempts-to-pass; qualification: scrap == 0 AND first_pass >= MIN_FIRST_PASS (fail-closed)
a passing yield appends {lot, rung, scope, yield, evidence_sha, prev} to the Q-ledger (infra.cwp.ledger chain) — the record a grant cross-references (Q2: scope granted = scope earned)
usage: Set PERFORMER_LOT (the lot hash) + COUPONS (manifest: [{coupon_id, skill, perk, attempts: [run-ledger paths]}]). Optional RUNG (default executor), SCOPE, MIN_FIRST_PASS (default 0.8), Q_LEDGER. Output: coupon.json.
limitation: Iteration economy is measured in attempts; the settle-side cost linkage (per-coupon spend) is not read yet.
